meta_title: Giant Inflatable Blower Screen | From 5m to 24m
meta_desc: Giant inflatable cinema screen with continuous blower. Sizes from 5m to 24m, quick installation, professional quality. Ideal for outdoor cinema.
hero_h2: Giant screens for all your events
hero_p1: Transform your outdoor events with our giant inflatable screens, available in sizes ranging from
hero_p2_before: For film screenings, sporting events or festivals, our screens combine
specs_note: All sizes are customisable. Contact us for custom sizes.
advantages_title: Why are our screens the best?
adv_light_desc: The lightest in the world, easy to carry. Our screens are up to 3× lighter than the competition thanks to our patented airbag fabric technology.
adv_fast_desc: Inflate in minutes with a permanent blower. A single operator is all you need for models up to 13m.
adv_solid_desc: Designed to withstand the elements and wind. Our screens are tested for winds of up to 60 km/h.
adv_silent_desc: Low-noise blower included in each kit. Does not interfere with sound projection.
adv_quality_desc: High-definition projection screen, gain 1.2. 4K, laser and standard projector compatible.
adv_custom_desc: Printing of logos, visuals and custom colours. Each screen can be adapted to your visual identity.
install_step1_desc: Unfold the screen on the floor. No tools required, everything is included in the kit.
install_step2_desc: Connect the blower and the screen inflates in 3 to 5 minutes, depending on size.
install_step3_desc: Position your projector and start projection. The screen is ready to use.
cta_desc: Get made-to-measure inflatable solutions for your outdoor event. Contact us, request a quick quote or discover our competitive rates.
apps_subtitle: Our giant inflatable screens are ideal for :
app_cinema_desc: Offer a unique outdoor cinema experience. Create drive-ins with our giant screens, visible from the vehicles.
app_sport_desc: Broadcast matches in large format. Broadcast competitions and events for your fans and supporters.
app_festival_desc: Attract crowds with giant projections. Films, visual concerts, shows - our screens adapt to all formats.
app_conf_desc: Give your presentations extra visibility. Product launches, outdoor corporate seminars.
why_exp_desc: Over 30 years designing inflatable solutions. Over 1,000 screens sold worldwide.
why_service_desc: From design to installation, we're with you every step of the way. Technical advice, customisation, international logistics.
why_custom_desc: Add logos or specific visuals. Each screen can be adapted to your needs: customised dimensions, personalised printing.
